smb_browser.backend_unavailable: The SMB browser backend is not available on this platform yet. This page shell is ready, but the Switch-side transport still needs to be connected.
smb_browser.open_failed: Failed to open this SMB location.
smb_browser.empty: This directory does not contain visible folders or files that match the current extension filter.
smb_browser.delete_directory_not_supported: Directory deletion is not supported yet.

checkpoints.1: Open the selected SMB file through a real stream handle
checkpoints.2: Pass the resolved source into the shared player shell
checkpoints.3: Add resume and exit flow back to the SMB browser

iptv_browser.loading_detail: The first open fetches the remote M3U playlist. Please wait.
iptv_browser.backend_unavailable: The IPTV playlist backend is not available in this build.
iptv_browser.open_failed: Failed to open this IPTV playlist.
iptv_browser.unexpected_error: An unexpected error occurred while requesting the IPTV playlist.
iptv_browser.empty: This playlist does not contain any visible channels.
iptv_browser.exit_confirm: Return to Home? Opening this IPTV source again will reload the playlist.
iptv_browser.favorites_empty: There are no favorite channels yet.
iptv_browser.group_empty: This group does not contain any visible channels.
iptv_browser.unfavorite_confirm: Are you sure you want to remove this favorite?

home.no_sources_hint: There are no enabled IPTV or SMB sources yet. Press + to add them in Settings.

history.title: Playback History
history.subtitle: This slot will later combine recent IPTV and SMB playback in one place

history.title: Playback History
history.subtitle: A future view for recent IPTV and SMB playback in one unified list

checkpoints.1: Define one shared playback-history structure for IPTV and SMB
checkpoints.2: Show the recent-play list with source markers
checkpoints.3: Support returning directly to the selected item

player.title: Playback Test
player.subtitle: Shared player shell, transport controls and runtime state

checkpoints.1: Define player layout, overlays and playback state model
checkpoints.2: Add fixed Switch media entry points
checkpoints.3: Wire buffering, transport controls and exit flow

iptv.title: IPTV
iptv.subtitle: Live channels, playlist intake and grouped navigation

checkpoints.1: Add source profiles, sample playlists and refresh flow
checkpoints.2: Build grouped channel navigation with metadata rows
checkpoints.3: Pass live channel selection into the shared player activity

smb.title: SMB
smb.subtitle: Saved shares, browsing flow and seekable media access

checkpoints.1: Add saved servers, credentials and share targets
checkpoints.2: Validate directory listing, probing and seekable reads
checkpoints.3: Pass selected files into the shared player activity

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Runtime checks, source config and diagnostics surface

checkpoints.1: Surface runtime target, build info and health checks
checkpoints.2: Reserve IPTV and SMB configuration sections
checkpoints.3: Prepare logging, storage and environment validation

placeholder.summary: This page already occupies a real product slot. The next step is replacing the shell with the smallest working flow that proves the module.

current_state.title: Current state
current_state.detail: Shell page is live and ready for implementation

path.title: Delivery path
path.summary: These checkpoints define the smallest useful path from shell page to working module.

player_page.title: Player
player_page.fallback_subtitle: Playable target ready for the shared player shell
player_page.summary: This page now receives the resolved SMB playback target. The next implementation step is wiring a real playback backend into this handoff instead of routing through a placeholder view.

delete.confirm_generic: Delete the current file from this SMB share?

errors.unsupported_web_stream: This IPTV entry currently points to a {0} web page rather than a directly playable media stream.

status.title: Current status
status.detail: SMB playback target is resolved, but the playback backend is not integrated yet
status.missing_locator: This target does not expose an openable locator yet.
status.backend_missing_switch: The Switch build does not include a real playback backend yet.
status.backend_missing_platform: This platform does not include a playback backend yet.
status.started_primary: Launch request sent using the direct locator.
status.started_fallback: Launch request sent using the fallback locator.

1.title: Playback backend
1.detail: Attach libmpv or another real player backend to this page

2.title: First validation
2.detail: Try the direct SMB locator first and confirm open plus seek behavior

3.title: Fallback path
3.detail: If direct SMB open is unstable, replace it with a custom SMB stream adapter

settings_page.header_subtitle: Basic runtime preferences stored in switchbox.ini
settings_page.summary: Changes first stay on this page as a draft. After choosing a value and returning from the dropdown, press + to save and apply it. Press B to confirm whether to leave.
settings_page.exit_confirm: You have unsaved changes. Are you sure you want to leave?

general.title: Basic Settings
general.summary: This page shows agreed runtime options and marks whether each option is already wired to real behavior in the current development stage.

validation.positive_float: Please enter a number greater than 0.

playable_extensions.title: Playable file extensions
playable_extensions.hint: Use commas to separate extensions. The default value is based on nxmp and is used to filter visible SMB media files.

short_seek.title: Short seek step
short_seek.hint: Seek step in seconds for short jump operations.

long_seek.title: Long seek step
long_seek.hint: Seek step in seconds for long jump operations.

y_hold_speed_multiplier.title: Hold-Y speed multiplier
y_hold_speed_multiplier.hint: Playback speed multiplier used when holding Y.

continuous_seek_interval_ms.title: Continuous seek interval
continuous_seek_interval_ms.hint: Repeat interval in milliseconds for combo seek actions such as R+Left/Right and ZR+Left/Right.

apply.title: Apply changes
apply.detail_dirty: Press + to save to switchbox.ini and apply now
